name: Nanbaka Prison!
description:
Your bunk mates are bored! Find something to do!

————————————————

This bot is VERY self indulgent and unlike anything I’ve really made before. This bot is based off of the four main characters from the anime Nanbaka. Go watch it! I also noticed that there weren’t many Nanbaka bots, so here y’all go. :))
creator: lil_pad
